# kong-gateway_rbac_role_entity (Resource)

RbacRoleEntity Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kong-gateway_rbac_role_entity" "my_rbacroleentity" {
  actions = [
    "..."
  ]
  comment     = "...my_comment..."
  created_at  = 8
  entity_id   = "...my_entity_id..."
  entity_type = "...my_entity_type..."
  negative    = true
  role_id     = "...my_role_id..."
  updated_at  = 4
  workspace   = "team-payments"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `actions` (Set of String) Requires replacement if changed.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) Additional comment or description for the RBAC role entity. Requires replacement if changed.
- `created_at` (Number) Unix epoch when the resource was created. Requires replacement if changed.
- `entity_id` (String) The ID of the entity associated with the RBAC role. Requires replacement if changed.
- `entity_type` (String) The type of the entity associated with the RBAC role. Requires replacement if changed.
- `negative` (Boolean) Indicates whether the RBAC role has negative permissions for the entity. Requires replacement if changed.
- `role_id` (String) Requires replacement if changed.
- `updated_at` (Number) Unix epoch when the resource was last updated. Requires replacement if changed.
- `workspace` (String) The name of the workspace. Default: "default"; Requires replacement if changed.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = kong-gateway_rbac_role_entity.my_kong-gateway_rbac_role_entity
  id = jsonencode({
    entity_id = ""
    role_id   = ""
    workspace = "team-payments"
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import kong-gateway_rbac_role_entity.my_kong-gateway_rbac_role_entity '{"entity_id": "", "role_id": "", "workspace": "team-payments"}'
```
